sentence: Bloring chiche hits different when nobody warned you to look away.

wombos.definition: Alluringly boring — something dull that somehow draws you in anyway. The quality of being so mundane it loops back around to fascinating. 'Greatest of all time at outdated bloring.'
Extra cheesy in a quiche way — something so niche and quirky it's also a little cheesy about it. The self-aware, dairy-enhanced cousin of quiche.
